title: Session recovery restores progress after reload and allows continuing from last step
description: Verifies that after making progress and waiting for auto-save, a reload restores the session and the user can continue from the last saved step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Navigate through at least two steps and enter some form data
Wait for 2 seconds
Reload the page
Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to resume the project
Verify the user is returned to the last saved step with previously entered data restored

title: Access project by phone number and start at the next required step
description: Verifies a customer can enter a valid Spanish phone number and is redirected into their project session where the form opens on the correct next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a valid Spanish phone number into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify the user is redirected into a project session identified by a project code in the URL
Verify the first required form step is displayed

title: Submit project after completing all required items
description: Verifies that a customer can complete all required sections, see all checklist items marked complete, submit the project, and reach a confirmation screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Navigate through the form to complete all required sections until reaching the review step
Navigate to /review
Submit the project from the review step
Verify a submission confirmation screen is displayed

title: Enforce DNI back-side requirement when only front is provided
description: Verifies that uploading a DNI front-only triggers a back-side requirement and the user can satisfy it by uploading the back image.

steps.description: Navigate to /property-docs
Upload a DNI front-only image that is detected as the card front
Verify a prompt indicates the DNI back-side is required
Upload a DNI back-side image
Confirm the identity document upload
Verify the identity document requirement is satisfied and the flow allows continuation

title: Local backups preserve property-docs photos and inputs across restart
description: Verifies that photos and inputs added on the property documents step are saved locally and restored when reopening the same project code.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Navigate to the property documents step
Add at least one document photo through the in-app capture/selection flow
Fill a text input on the property documents step with a distinctive value like ELT-RESTORE-CHECK
Wait for 2 seconds
Reload the page
Navigate to the property documents step
Verify previously added document photos and the entered value ELT-RESTORE-CHECK are present

title: Upload all required property documents, review extracted data, and continue
description: Verifies a customer can upload required documents, review AI-extracted data for each, confirm, and proceed to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /property-docs
Upload an identity document using a supported file type
Upload an IBI certificate using a supported file type
Upload electricity bill pages using a supported file type
Review the extracted data shown for the uploaded documents
Confirm the uploads and continue
Verify the next step after property documents is displayed

title: Checklist gating prevents submit when a required item is incomplete
description: Verifies that the review step blocks final submission while any required checklist item is incomplete and guides the user to fix it.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Proceed through the form leaving at least one required section incomplete and reach the review step
Navigate to /review
Attempt to submit the project
Verify the project is not submitted and the UI indicates at least one required item must be completed

title: Assessor can access dashboard and open a project detail view
description: Verifies that an assessor can authenticate into the dashboard, see a list of submitted projects, and open a project to view its details.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the admin password field
Submit the admin password
Select a project from the list
Verify the project detail view shows uploaded documents, extracted data, and signatures

title: Assessor can download a project ZIP from project details
description: Verifies that an assessor can open a project in the dashboard and initiate a ZIP download for that project from the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the admin password field
Submit the admin password
Select a project from the list
Initiate the project ZIP download
Verify a ZIP download is initiated

title: Fix an incomplete checklist item via deep link and successfully submit
description: Verifies that a user can jump from an incomplete checklist item to its step, complete it, return to review, and submit successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Proceed through the form leaving exactly one required item incomplete and reach the review step
Navigate to /review
Click the incomplete checklist item to navigate to the referenced step
Complete the missing requirement on that step
Return through the form to the review step
Submit the project
Verify a submission confirmation screen is displayed

title: Complete all required legal signatures and proceed
description: Verifies that a customer can sign each required legal PDF in sequence and proceed to the next step after all signatures are completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /representation
Add a signature in the signature pad for the current legal document
Confirm the signed document
Repeat signing for each remaining required legal document
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user lands on either the energy certificate survey step or the review step
Verify the representation signing step shows all required documents as completed

title: Auto-save keeps progress when navigating away and returning to the same project
description: Verifies that after auto-save runs, leaving the flow and returning with the same project code restores progress without requiring re-entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Navigate to any mid-flow step and enter some form data
Wait for 2 seconds
Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to resume the project
Verify the previous session is restored and the user can continue without losing entered data

title: Route Madrid customers to representation signing with two required signatures
description: Verifies that selecting Madrid shows a requirement of two legal signatures and routes the customer to the representation signing step when continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /province-selection
Select Madrid as the province
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user lands on the representation signing step
Verify the UI indicates that two legal documents require signature

title: Route Cataluña customers to representation signing with three required signatures
description: Verifies that selecting Cataluña shows a requirement of three legal signatures and routes the customer to the representation signing step when continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /province-selection
Select Cataluña as the province
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user lands on the representation signing step
Verify the UI indicates that three legal documents require signature

title: Completing housing, openings, thermal systems, additional info and signature proceeds to review
description: Verifies that completing all four survey steps plus the certificate signature allows the customer to continue to review.

steps.description: Navigate to /energy-certificate
Fill valid values into the housing data step fields
Click to continue to the next survey step
Fill valid values into the openings step fields
Click to continue to the next survey step
Fill valid values into the thermal systems step fields
Click to continue to the next survey step
Fill valid values into the additional info step fields
Click to continue to the signature step
Add a signature for the completed certificate
Confirm and continue
Verify the user lands on the review step

title: Allow NIE certificate upload without requiring a back-side
description: Verifies that uploading a single-document NIE certificate satisfies identity requirements without prompting for a back-side.

steps.description: Navigate to /property-docs
Upload an NIE certificate document using a supported file type
Verify no prompt is shown requiring an additional back-side upload
Confirm the identity document upload
Verify the identity document requirement is satisfied

title: Skip signing for non-listed provinces and route forward
description: Verifies that selecting an Other province skips the representation signing requirement and routes the customer to the next step (energy-certificate or review) when continuing.

steps.description: Navigate to /province-selection
Select an Other province option
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user does not land on the representation signing step
Verify the user lands on either the energy certificate survey step or the review step

title: Review displays completion status for each required section
description: Verifies that the review step shows a checklist with clear completion status for the major required sections.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the phone number field
Submit the phone number to start or resume the project
Navigate to /review
Verify a checklist with completion status is displayed for identity, property documents, province/signing, and energy certificate

title: Skip the energy certificate survey and proceed to review
description: Verifies that choosing to skip the energy certificate survey routes the customer directly to review without completing survey steps.

steps.description: Navigate to /energy-certificate
Choose to skip the energy certificate survey
Verify the user lands on the review step
Verify the energy certificate section is shown as skipped or not required in review

title: Prevent proceeding when at least one required legal document is unsigned
description: Verifies that the customer cannot continue past representation signing until all required legal documents have been signed.

steps.description: Navigate to /representation
Add a signature for the first legal document
Confirm the signed document
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user remains on the representation signing step
Verify an incomplete-signatures validation state is visible

title: Assessor can export projects list as CSV
description: Verifies that an assessor can export the projects list to CSV from the dashboard UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Fill eltex2025 into the admin password field
Submit the admin password
Initiate export of the projects list as CSV
Verify a CSV download is initiated

title: Recalculate signing requirement when changing province selection before continuing
description: Verifies that changing the selected province updates the displayed signing requirement before proceeding.

steps.description: Navigate to /province-selection
Select Cataluña as the province
Select Madrid as the province
Verify the UI indicates that two legal documents require signature
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user lands on the representation signing step

title: Optionally upload CUPS contract without blocking continuation
description: Verifies a customer can optionally upload a CUPS contract and still proceed after confirming the required document set.

steps.description: Navigate to /property-docs
Upload an identity document using a supported file type
Upload an IBI certificate using a supported file type
Upload electricity bill pages using a supported file type
Upload a CUPS contract using a supported file type
Confirm the uploads and continue
Verify the next step after property documents is displayed

title: Allow re-signing a legal document before continuing
description: Verifies that the customer can clear or redo a signature for a legal PDF and still complete signing successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /representation
Add a signature in the signature pad for the current legal document
Clear the signature
Add a new signature in the signature pad
Confirm the signed document
Verify the current legal document is marked as signed

title: Prevent progressing from a survey step with missing required fields
description: Verifies that required fields in the energy certificate survey must be completed before continuing to the next step.

steps.description: Navigate to /energy-certificate
Leave required fields empty on the current survey step
Click to continue to the next survey step
Verify the user remains on the current survey step
Verify a required-field validation error is visible

title: Block continuing until a province is selected
description: Verifies that the user cannot continue without selecting a province and is shown an inline validation state.

steps.description: Navigate to /province-selection
Click to continue to the next step
Verify the user remains on the province selection step
Verify a province selection validation error is visible

title: Reject incorrectly formatted phone number
description: Verifies that submitting an incorrectly formatted phone number shows a validation error and the user remains on the entry step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill an incorrectly formatted phone number into the phone number field
Submit the phone number
Verify a phone number validation error is visible
Verify the user remains on the phone number entry step
